mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_adjust_log ( product_id, product_name_snapshot, before_quantity, after_quantity, change_quantity, change_type, biz_order_id, biz_order_no, operator_name, reason, remark ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{productNameSnapshot}, #{beforeQuantity}, #{afterQuantity}, #{changeQuantity}, #{changeType}, #{bizOrderId}, #{bizOrderNo}, #{operatorName}, #{reason}, #{remark} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_adjust_log sal LEFT JOIN product p ON sal.product_id = p.id
AND COALESCE(sal.product_name_snapshot, p.product_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
